  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Pipeline description contains internally checkable logical claims (e.g., co-regulation defined as Pearson r > 0.6 'across samples' is ambiguous about which sample pool; FPKM-to-decile binning logic; FDR threshold application via Cuffdiff) that could be load-bearing depending on the help requested.",
    "R1.3": "Section asserts reproducibility, benchmark validity, and alignment tool adequacy (e.g., TopHat2/Cufflinks are deprecated in favor of STAR/RSEM/Salmon; FPKM is disfavored vs. TPM or raw counts for LLM input); these claims need evidence alignment if the task is methodological review.",
    "R1.6": "'Help me with this section' frequently signals prose editing; sentence-level quality, paragraph transitions, and technical clarity are plausible primary asks.",
    "R1.7": "Three citation clusters are present (TopHat2, Bowtie2, Cufflinks/Cuffdiff) with specific author-year keys; GOA release date is stated; accuracy and completeness of attribution are verifiable and could be load-bearing."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want a methodological critique (pipeline validity, internal logical consistency, citation accuracy) rather than writing polish (prose clarity, sentence flow, paragraph quality)?"
}

rationale.R1.2: Pipeline description contains internally checkable logical claims (e.g., co-regulation defined as Pearson r > 0.6 'across samples' is ambiguous about which sample pool; FPKM-to-decile binning logic; FDR threshold application via Cuffdiff) that could be load-bearing depending on the help requested.
rationale.R1.3: Section asserts reproducibility, benchmark validity, and alignment tool adequacy (e.g., TopHat2/Cufflinks are deprecated in favor of STAR/RSEM/Salmon; FPKM is disfavored vs. TPM or raw counts for LLM input); these claims need evidence alignment if the task is methodological review.
rationale.R1.6: 'Help me with this section' frequently signals prose editing; sentence-level quality, paragraph transitions, and technical clarity are plausible primary asks.
rationale.R1.7: Three citation clusters are present (TopHat2, Bowtie2, Cufflinks/Cuffdiff) with specific author-year keys; GOA release date is stated; accuracy and completeness of attribution are verifiable and could be load-bearing.

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want a methodological critique (pipeline validity, internal logical consistency, citation accuracy) rather than writing polish (prose clarity, sentence flow, paragraph quality)?
